ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data (e.g., Rainfall, Soil Moisture) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., Rainfall Patterns) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data collection method (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., Daily, Monthly) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("frequency") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., West Branch, Iowa, United States) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Daily, Monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team lead */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the lead belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team lead was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team lead was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leads_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset shared */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing event (e.g., pending, shared, declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sharing event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sharing event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
